parents.subject: LU-19344 llite: glimpse on read and update i_blocks

commit.subject: LU-19096 debug: do not hang when sanity-flr/34a fails
commit.message:
LU-19096 debug: do not hang when sanity-flr/34a fails

When sanity-flr/34a file compare fails ost 2 and 3 should be
restarted.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic001725f4c6e8e7e76938da170e137b351356666
